---
title: "Financial Dashboards"
format: html
---

<div class="grid">

<div class="g-col-4">
<a href="dashboards/compound_interest.qmd" class="project-card-link">
<div class="project-card">
<h3>Compound Interest</h3>
<p>Visualize how your investments grow over time with the power of compounding.</p>
</div>
</a>
</div>


</div>
